questionHtml:
The vertical acceleration of the load downwards is 2.4 m s−2.

Calculate the tension in the string.
markschemeHtml:
use of ma = mg − T «3.5 x 2.4 = 3.5g − T »

OR

T = 3.5(g − 2.4) ✓

26 «N» ✓

 

Accept 27 N from g = 10 m s−2

meta.title: The vertical acceleration of the load downwards is 2.4 m s−2. Calculate the tension in the string.
